title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Doflamingo Family, Franky, Kinemon, Zoro, Unknown person #1 as dressrosa’s Corrida Colosseum becomes the center of attention as Luffy enters under the name Lucy and learns the Flame-Flame Fruit is the prize.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Since older times, these fairies- unseen by the naked eye- have been the guardian duties of dressrose.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We have no choice but to overlook their mischief.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop fucking around!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Stop indeed, that he should!! That sword is wankuni's national treasure!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Huh!? My sword is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's not yours, that it's not!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I challenge you to a duel, so that I may reclaim shusui for Manokun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmph. That's fine. As long as you're ready to lose!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You've been greedy ...fairies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: But you won't get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: WaH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: KYAH!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hey Zoro, where're you going!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Hold up!! We don't have time for you to go wandering and getting lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Sounds fun, shishish!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Wait up, Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Have you found the culprit!? Wanokuni's treasure shall not fall into the hands of another!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hey, let go! We're going too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'VE GOT AN IDEA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I know this bunch all too well by now, so it looks like I've got to do what needs to be done.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Just leave everything to your bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Just as I thought... you're clearly one of Doflamingo's men.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Eek!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But we're not the types to be intimidated by that fact. So tell us what you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's... it's like I said!! Of course I remember being ordered to chase after those sa- mural

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Crumble Crumble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But I don't know how they were captured or where they are now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And ... I've got no idea about this "smile" ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Not even a clue about the "S"!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Not even the "S"....!! Not even the "F" in "Factory" either...!! just who are you people...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What a waste. This guy probably doesn't even know about his own friends.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Alright then, tell us where we can find someone with a little more clout!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Seems like you're just too much of a small fry

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Everyone's real busy today so I don't know where they are!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Even I've been called to the Colosseum ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Have a look for yourselves! The whole country is heading to the colosseum today

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Right, that's right ...!! If you're looking to meet the higher-ups, you should go to "Corrida Colossseum"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's a big event today!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: I'm sure the officers of the family will be gathering there....!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Seems as though the young master...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Has prepared an amazing prize!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Man, I've got butterflies just thinking about it! It's something that anyone would die to get

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: could it be ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The delicious meat that Mingo was talking about!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All he said is that it's something you'd want.

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
